item.title: Exploring an Airplane Abandoned for 20 Years
item.description: An aircraft left untouched for two decades is explored and inspected to see what condition it’s in today. Could it ever fly again?

media:content.media:title: Exploring an Airplane Abandoned for 20 Years
media:content.media:description: An aircraft left untouched for two decades is explored and inspected to see what condition it’s in today. Could it ever fly again?

item.title: The Story Behind “Douglas Wrong-Way”
item.description: The origins of the nickname “Douglas Wrong-Way” are revealed through stories, mistakes, and memorable moments. How did the name end up sticking?

media:content.media:title: The Story Behind “Douglas Wrong-Way”
media:content.media:description: The origins of the nickname “Douglas Wrong-Way” are revealed through stories, mistakes, and memorable moments. How did the name end up sticking?

item.title: Restoring an Abandoned Airplane
item.description: An abandoned airplane begins a restoration journey as years of neglect are slowly reversed through repair and rebuilding work. What will it take to make this aircraft whole again?

media:content.media:title: Restoring an Abandoned Airplane
media:content.media:description: An abandoned airplane begins a restoration journey as years of neglect are slowly reversed through repair and rebuilding work. What will it take to make this aircraft whole again?

item.title: Trying to Sell an Airplane
item.description: The process of selling an airplane brings unexpected challenges, negotiations, and behind-the-scenes decisions. What does it really take to sell an aircraft?

media:content.media:title: Trying to Sell an Airplane
media:content.media:description: The process of selling an airplane brings unexpected challenges, negotiations, and behind-the-scenes decisions. What does it really take to sell an aircraft?

item.title: Back to Life After 20 Years
item.description: A long-dormant machine finally runs again after two decades, marking a huge milestone in the restoration journey. What does it take to bring something back after so many years?

media:content.media:title: Back to Life After 20 Years
media:content.media:description: A long-dormant machine finally runs again after two decades, marking a huge milestone in the restoration journey. What does it take to bring something back after so many years?

item.title: Exploring an Abandoned WW1 Airplane
item.description: An abandoned World War I-era airplane is explored up close, revealing rare details and signs of history frozen in time. What stories could this aircraft still tell?

media:content.media:title: Exploring an Abandoned WW1 Airplane
media:content.media:description: An abandoned World War I-era airplane is explored up close, revealing rare details and signs of history frozen in time. What stories could this aircraft still tell?

item.title: Attempting to Revive a Long-Abandoned Plane
item.description: A long-abandoned aircraft is inspected and worked on in hopes of bringing it back to life. What challenges come with restoring a forgotten plane?

media:content.media:title: Attempting to Revive a Long-Abandoned Plane
media:content.media:description: A long-abandoned aircraft is inspected and worked on in hopes of bringing it back to life. What challenges come with restoring a forgotten plane?
